commands.summary: Build a Unity project from the command line. Spawns the editor in batch mode and

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: Project path or name (defaults to the current directory)

options.description: Build target (e.g. StandaloneWindows64, Android, iOS, WebGL). Required.
Static C# method to invoke (e.g. Builder.PerformBuild). Required — Unity has no built-in command-line build.
Optional build target group, forwarded to Unity as -buildTargetGroup
Output path passed to Unity as -buildOutput (your executeMethod is responsible for honoring it)
Log file path (default: <project>/Logs/build-<target>-<timestamp>.log)
Override editor version (default: from ProjectVersion.txt)
Path to a specific editor binary
Editor architecture (x86_64 or arm64) (default: "unknown")
Extra arguments passed to Unity (shell-split)
Do not stream the log to stdout in real time
Install the project's editor version if it is not already installed
Android export type: apk, aab, or android-studio-project (Android targets only, default: apk) (choices: "apk", "aab", "android-studio-project", default: "apk")
Base64-encoded keystore file contents — decoded to a temp file before the build and deleted after (Android targets only; warning: CLI args may appear in shell history and CI logs)
Password for the keystore (Android targets only, required with --android-keystore-base64; warning: CLI args may appear in shell history and CI logs)
Key alias inside the keystore (Android targets only, required with --android-keystore-base64)
Password for the key alias (Android targets only, defaults to --android-keystore-password; warning: CLI args may appear in shell history and CI logs)
Android SDK target version integer, e.g. 34 (Android targets only)
Debug symbol export type: none, public, or debugging (Android targets only, default: none) (choices: "none", "public", "debugging", default: "none")
Explicit Android versionCode integer (Android targets only)
Versioning strategy to apply to the build (semantic, tag, custom, none). Default: none. (choices: "semantic", "tag", "custom", "none", default: "none")
Explicit version string to stamp on the build. Only used when --versioning-strategy is 'custom'; ignored for all other strategies.
Skip the uncommitted-changes guard (default: false) (default: false)
